creator: sunpoet@FreeBSD.org
text:
I cannot reproduce the failure.

HTML::TokeParser is part of www/p5-HTML-Parser which is already a build/runtime dependency of www/p5-WWW-Mechanize. Please confirm that p5-HTML-Parser is installed which should be done automatically. For Perl 5.28, HTML::TokeParser should be installed at /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/mach/5.28/HTML/TokeParser.pm. If you cannot find it, rebuild/reinstall both ports and try again.
